description: A massive, high-impact hero section. Background is a clean, off-white with a subtle architectural grid pattern. The central focus is a 'Search Hub'—a large rounded container with three distinct inputs: 'What are you looking for?', 'Location (State)', and a 'Culture/Identity' filter dropdown. On focus, the search bar expands slightly. Above the search, a H1 reads 'Every Business Has a Story. Find Yours.' with 'Story' highlighted in Kin Gold. Beneath the search, 'Trending: Black-Owned, LGBTQ+ Friendly, Veteran-Led' tags appear as clickable badges.
